questions.question: Which of the following learning algorithms is based on finding the closest instance to the new instance?
questions.explanation: Nearest-Neighbor Learning is based on finding the closest instance to the new instance.

questions.question: What is the main idea behind Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Algorithm?
options: A) Giving equal weightage to all instances
B) Giving more weightage to nearest instances
questions.explanation: The main idea behind Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Algorithm is to give more weightage to nearest instances.

questions.question: Which method of classification is based on finding the centroid of all instances in a class?
questions.explanation: Nearest Centroid Classifier is based on finding the centroid of all instances in a class.

questions.question: What is the main idea behind Locally Weighted algorithm?
options: C) Using global patterns to local patterns
D) Using local patterns to global patterns
questions.explanation: The main idea behind Locally Weighted algorithm is to use local patterns to global patterns.

questions.question: Which of the following algorithms is a type of supervised learning algorithm?
questions.explanation: Support Vector Machine is a type of supervised learning algorithm.
